children.description: عمود يحدد كل صف بشكل فريد

children.code:
-- إنشاء جدول
CREATE TABLE students (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    age INT,
    gpa DECIMAL(3,2),
    enrollment_date DATE
);
children.caption: إنشاء جدول - CREATE TABLE
إدراج - INSERT

children.code:
-- استعلام عن البيانات
SELECT name, gpa 
FROM students 
WHERE age > 18 
ORDER BY gpa DESC;
children.caption: استعلام - SELECT

children.code:
-- تحديث البيانات
UPDATE students 
SET gpa = 3.7 
WHERE id = 1;

-- حذف البيانات
DELETE FROM students 
WHERE age < 16;
children.caption: تحديث وحذف - UPDATE/DELETE

children.code:
-- INNER JOIN
SELECT s.name, d.dept_name
FROM students s
INNER JOIN departments d 
ON s.dept_id = d.id;

-- LEFT JOIN
SELECT s.name, d.dept_name
FROM students s
LEFT JOIN departments d 
ON s.dept_id = d.id;

-- RIGHT JOIN
SELECT s.name, d.dept_name
FROM students s
RIGHT JOIN departments d 
ON s.dept_id = d.id;
children.caption: أنواع الـ JOIN

children.code:
-- FULL OUTER JOIN (في PostgreSQL)
SELECT s.name, d.dept_name
FROM students s
FULL OUTER JOIN departments d 
ON s.dept_id = d.id;

-- CROSS JOIN
SELECT * 
FROM students, departments;
children.caption: JOIN إضافي

children.solution:
المشكلة: تكرار student_name لكل course
الحل: تقسيم لجدولين:
- students(id, name)
- enrollments(student_id, course_id)

children.title: تلميح
children.text: 1 ذري، 2 كامل، 3 لا متعدٍ، BCNF محدد

children.caption: إنشاء وحذف الفهارس
دوال تجميعية أساسية

children.code:
-- GROUP BY
SELECT dept_id, COUNT(*) as num, AVG(gpa) as avg_gpa
FROM students
GROUP BY dept_id;

-- HAVING (فلترة بعد التجميع)
SELECT dept_id, COUNT(*) as num
FROM students
GROUP BY dept_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5;
children.caption: GROUP BY و HAVING

children.title: NULL
children.text: NULL ≠ 0 ≠ '', استخدم IS NULL/IS NOT NULL

children.title: DROP vs DELETE
children.text: DROP = حذف كامل، DELETE = حذف صفوف

children.title: فهرسة
children.text: فهرس على أعمدة WHERE و JOIN

children.title: ترتيب
children.text: WHERE ثم GROUP BY ثم HAVING ثم ORDER BY
